results.rendered_html:
paricyu 1 A.
1 To go away or fly off from, escape.
2 To proceed from.
3 To swerve, fall off from, deviate, leave.
4 To lose. be deprived of,
5 To drop or fall down.
6 To be displaced or ejected from.
7 To be freed from.
8 To come down, descend.
